landing.title: FrameMatch
landing.tagline: We connect {{strong1}} professionals with clients who need to hire their talent for a project.
landing.section_categories_subtitle: Find the creative professional you need, filtering by category.
landing.section_how_subtitle: From idea to result in 3 steps.
landing.cat_photo_body: Portrait, product, events, fashion, real estate, food and more.
landing.cat_video_body: Corporate, weddings, events, advertising, social media and drone production.
landing.cat_edit_body: Video editing, color grading, motion graphics and post-production.
landing.cat_content_body: Copywriting, scripts, social media, podcasts, newsletters and voice-over.
landing.how_step1_body: Create your account as a client or professional in less than a minute.
landing.how_step2_body: Clients filter by category, city and rate. Professionals complete their profile.
landing.how_step3_body: Chat, agree on the brief and start the project.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Get started in less than a minute.
register.role_client_body: I need to hire a professional for a project.
register.role_freelancer_body: I offer my photo, video or content creation services.
register.name: Name

oauth.error_complete_profile: Could not complete the profile. Please try again.
oauth.complete_profile_subtitle: Last step: how will you use FrameMatch?

client.hero_title: Find the perfect professional for your project.
client.hero_lead_after: in photo, video and content creation ready for your next gig. Filter by category, city and rate, and connect in less than 24h.
client.search_placeholder: What do you need? (e.g. 'video for my brand')
client.featured_subtitle: A selection of professionals available right now.
client.featured_empty: No featured professionals yet. Check back soon.
client.how_subtitle: From idea to result in 3 steps.
client.how_step1_body: Tell us what you need, your budget and timeline.
client.how_step2_body: Available professionals send you proposals in less than 24h.
client.how_step3_body: Agree on the brief, pay safely and receive your material.

freelancer.lead: Here's what's happening with your profile today.
freelancer.completion_done: Your profile is complete! You now appear in client searches.
freelancer.preview_subtitle: This is how clients see you when they search for professionals.
freelancer.preview_bio_empty: You haven't written a bio yet. Tell clients who you are and what makes you special.
freelancer.tip1_body: Pros with 5+ samples get 3x more contacts.
freelancer.tip2_body: Replying in under 2h doubles your close rate.
freelancer.tip3_body: Clear pricing filters out mismatched clients.

list.title: Available professionals
list.lead: Filter by category, city or rate to find the right professional.
list.empty_body: We didn't find any professionals matching your search.
list.error_body: Could not load the catalog. Please try again.

detail.not_found_body: We didn't find this professional or they're no longer available.

profile_editor.title: Edit profile
profile_editor.subtitle: Update your public showcase and the skills you offer.
profile_editor.placeholder_bio: Tell them about your style and experience.
profile_editor.skills_hint: Pick up to 20 from the catalog. Set your level and years of experience.

account.title: My account
account.subtitle: Update your personal and contact details.
account.section_personal_hint: Your name and email appear on your public profile and in the emails we send you.
account.section_avatar_hint: Upload a photo so others can recognize you.
account.section_professional_hint: Your public showcase (bio, rates, portfolio) is edited separately.
account.error_phone_format: Only digits, spaces, parentheses, hyphens and a leading +.
account.section_oauth_hint: Sign in faster with an external provider. You can link more than one.
account.oauth_unlink_confirm: Disconnect {{provider}}? You will no longer be able to sign in with this account.
account.oauth_no_accounts: You have no external accounts linked.
account.oauth_only_warning: Your account can only be accessed via external providers. Add a password so you do not lose access.

list.title: Briefs
list.subtitle: Projects posted by clients looking for talent.
list.error: Could not load the brief catalog.

detail.proposals_empty: You haven't received any proposals yet.

form.title: New brief
form.subtitle: Describe your project so professionals can send you proposals.

proposal_form.title: Your proposal
proposal_form.placeholder_message: Tell the client why you are the right person for this project...

proposals.confirm_accept: Accept this proposal? The project will move to assigned.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.section_help: Rate the work with your client or professional.
reviews.form_subtitle: Share your experience. The review will be published with your name.
reviews.comment_placeholder: Tell the other party how it went…
reviews.already_reviewed: You have already rated this project.
reviews.complete_brief_first: Mark the project as completed before leaving a review.
reviews.complete_brief_confirm: Mark this project as completed? This action cannot be undone.
reviews.complete_brief_error: Could not mark the project as completed.
reviews.empty_for_brief: This project does not have reviews yet.
reviews.empty_for_user: This professional has no reviews yet.

brief_attachments.section_help: Upload up to 10 images to help professionals understand the project.
brief_attachments.empty: You haven't added any images yet.
brief_attachments.limit_reached: You have reached the limit of 10 images.
brief_attachments.error_save: Could not save the image on the project.
brief_attachments.error_limit: You have reached the image limit for this project.
brief_attachments.error_size: The image is too large (max 10 MB).
brief_attachments.error_title_required: Title is required to upload the image.

chat.title: Messages
chat.list_subtitle: Chats tied to your active projects.
chat.empty_list: You have no open conversations yet.
chat.no_messages: No messages yet. Be the first to write!

uploader.drop_zone: Drag an image here or click to select
uploader.error_size: Image is too large. Maximum {{max}} MB.
uploader.error_format: Format not supported. Use JPG, PNG or WebP.
uploader.error_network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
uploader.error_unknown: Could not upload the image. Please try again.

avatar.section_hint: A clear, professional image helps clients trust you.

cover.section_hint: A wide (16:5) image that shows on your public profile.

portfolio.empty_title: You haven't uploaded any work yet
portfolio.empty_body: Upload your first project so clients can see your style.
portfolio.description_placeholder: Tell them the context or your role in the project.
portfolio.delete_confirm: Remove this work from your portfolio?
portfolio.section_hint: Showcase your best projects. Reorder with the arrows.
portfolio.error_title_required: Title is required to upload the piece.
portfolio.error_description_required: Description is required to upload the piece.

welcome.title: Set up your professional profile
welcome.body: We will build your showcase in 5 steps. You can always come back and edit anything later.

datos.label: Basics
datos.title: Tell us about yourself
datos.lead: These details show on your public profile and in the emails we send you.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.title: Upload your profile photo
avatar.lead: A clear, professional image helps clients trust you.

bio-tarifa.label: Bio & rates
bio-tarifa.title: Define your offering
bio-tarifa.lead: Bio and rates are the first things clients look at when deciding.

skills.label: Skills
skills.title: Pick your skills
skills.lead: Choose from the catalog and set your level and years of experience.
skills.levels_title: Level and years of experience per skill

cover-portfolio.label: Cover
cover-portfolio.title: Cover and portfolio
cover-portfolio.lead: A wide cover image and 3+ work samples make a real difference. You can do this later from your profile.
cover-portfolio.optional_hint: This step is optional. You can skip and come back later.

done.label: Done
done.title: You are all set!
done.body: Your profile is live. Clients can see you and send you proposals.
